response.reasoning: Bogdan has 19 years of continuous software engineering experience and an MIT CS degree, meeting the 15-year minimum requirement with a strong technical foundation. He demonstrates broad expertise across web, mobile, infrastructure, testing, and DevOps. His GISCollective founder role shows entrepreneurial experience. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' as a key preferred qualification. His AI experience is limited to ~14 months at re:cinq working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—no prior track record of shipping AI products or platforms. Additionally, the role demands director-level strategic leadership (advising customers, identifying product differentiation, shaping technology adoption), while his career shows a strong individual contributor pattern with staff-level roles but no director-level strategic influence. He lacks the Master's/PhD in AI (preferred) and has no documented strategic customer partnerships or product vision influence expected at the principal level.
strengths: 19 years of engineering experience with MIT Computer Science degree; solid technical foundation exceeding experience minimum
Exceptional technical breadth across web, mobile, infrastructure, DevOps, and testing; demonstrates ability to learn new domains and paradigms
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq; shows recent commitment to emerging AI/platform technologies
concerns: AI/ML expertise is very recent (14 months); no demonstrated track record of building or shipping recognized AI products or platforms—a stated requirement for the role

Career progression shows individual contributor and staff-level roles with no evidence of director-level strategic influence, customer partnerships, or product vision leadership required for principal engineer
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred); no evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on technology adoption
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically accomplished engineer with strong fundamentals and impressive breadth across multiple domains. However, this principal engineer role requires deep, demonstrated AI expertise with shipped products and strategic customer impact—both significant gaps. His career trajectory shows excellent individual contributor growth but lacks the director-level strategic influence and customer advising experience the principal role demands. While his recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising, 14 months is insufficient tenure to demonstrate the recognized AI expertise and platform-building track record this role explicitly requires. He could be a strong fit for a staff or senior engineer role, or potentially principal in 3-5 years with proven AI platform impact.
